---
title: "Career"
toc: true
---

::: {.section-block .career-edu}
## Background

<p class="edu-entry">
<span class="edu-degree">Ph.D. candidate in Electronic Engineering</span> — <span class="edu-school">Hanyang University</span>, Seoul<br>
<span class="edu-detail">GPA 4.3 / 4.5 · Mar 2024 – present</span><br>
<span class="edu-lab">Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory</span><br>
<span class="edu-advisor">Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong</span>
</p>

<p class="edu-entry">
<span class="edu-degree">M.S. in Solid-state Physics</span> — <span class="edu-school">Dongguk University</span>, Seoul<br>
<span class="edu-detail">GPA 4.5 / 4.5 · Sep 2022 – Feb 2024</span><br>
<span class="edu-lab">Advanced Physics on Electromaterial Laboratory</span><br>
<span class="edu-advisor">Advisor: Prof. Kwun-Bum Chung</span><br>
<span class="edu-thesis">Thesis: "Performance Control of InSnZnO/InGaZnO Multi-Channel-Layered Transistors with Defect Analysis of Amorphous Oxide Semiconductors"</span>
</p>

<p class="edu-entry">
<span class="edu-degree">B.S. in Physics</span> — <span class="edu-school">Dongguk University</span>, Seoul<br>
<span class="edu-detail">GPA 4.2 / 4.5 · Mar 2016 – Aug 2022</span><br>
<span class="edu-detail">Undergraduate researcher, APEL · Jul 2021 – Aug 2022</span>
</p>
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Research Fellowship

**"Deep-Level Transient Spectroscopy and Nanospectroscopy for Ultrafine Defect Analysis Using Explainable AI in 2D Quantum Semiconductors"**\
Basic Science Research Program, National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF)\
Funded by the Ministry of Education · Sep 2025 – Aug 2027 · 50M KRW
:::

<div class="section-block">
<h2 class="section-title">Skills</h2>
<table class="skills-tbl">
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 230px">
<col>
</colgroup>
<tbody>
<tr><td><strong>Spectroscopy</strong></td><td>Raman, Photoluminescence, Ellipsometry, DLTS, Tip-enhanced nanospectroscopy</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>Machine Learning</strong></td><td>Physics-based data analysis, Deep learning for experimental data, Explainable AI (XAI)</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>Simulation</strong></td><td>FDTD simulations, Inverse design with adjoint optimization</td></tr>
<tr><td><strong>Others</strong></td><td>Electrical characterization (I-V, etc), XPS, Photolithography, Sputtering</td></tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>
